Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The sensitive attributes are ApplicantAge ApplicantGender ApplicantRace We assume that the process includes activities that might involve these attributes and decision activities

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We note that the example model already has existence StartApplication FinalDecision coexistence StartApplication coexists with FinalDecision response StartApplication leads to RequestAdditionalInfo succession RequestAdditionalInfo leads to FinalDecision

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: We are going to add constraints that ensure fairness

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Lets assume we have activities for checking sensitive attributes CheckApplicantRace CheckApplicantGender CheckApplicantAge decision activities Approve Reject RequestAdditionalInfo and a new activity ManualReview

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Since the DECLARE model is at the activity level we can assume that there are activities that represent decisions for sensitive groups or we can have a separate activity that records the sensitive attribute

Name: Validation - IND
Text: The problem says add new DECLARE constraints so we are only adding constraints not activities therefore we must assume that the necessary activities like ManualReview and BiasMitigationCheck are already present in the model or we are allowed to add them

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Given the ambiguity we will assume that we can introduce new activities and set their existence

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We introduce the following activities CheckApplicantRace CheckApplicantGender CheckApplicantAge BiasMitigationCheck ManualReview Approve Reject

Name: Validation - IND
Text: However the example model has FinalDecision We can interpret FinalDecision as one of the decisions or break it down

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: We decide to keep the existing model as much as possible and keep FinalDecision as the decision step

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We will add existence for the new activities coexistence FinalDecision with ManualReview response from each sensitive attribute check to BiasMitigationCheck precedence of BiasMitigationCheck before FinalDecision and nonsuccession from each sensitive attribute check to FinalDecision

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: This approach keeps the existing activities and constraints while adding fairness safeguards

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Rationale coexistence between FinalDecision and ManualReview ensures every final decision is accompanied by manual review response from sensitive attribute checks to BiasMitigationCheck ensures a mitigation step occurs precedence ensures mitigation occurs before final decision and nonsuccession prevents immediate decision after sensitive attribute checks
